She keeps the property that the valuation is high (specifically, $\geq v_2(a)+1$) immediately after her move, ensuring an even number exists for Bob to play on.

The text explicitly mentions this inequality right before the missing tag. Filling it with the inequality $v_2 (n') \geq v_2 (a)+1$ makes the most logical sense: "Alice will apply the same strategy and keep $v_2 (n') \geq v_2 (a)+1$." This ensures the game continues.
*   **Selection**: `<missing 1>` corresponds to **expression 2**.
